strengths: Proven experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Background in developing scalable and testable software systems
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and high-stakes commercial environments
No clear indication of experience with large-scale team leadership or governance

response.justification: The candidate has a strong technical background with diverse experience and relevant skills in AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in fintech and high-stakes environments, as well as clear leadership experience at scale.
